title: Generating a Recursion Depth Chart
scenario: Develop a recursion depth chart for a binary search tree with 12 nodes, highlighting the recursive structure and node values. The prompt should include a detailed description of the tree's properties and the recursive algorithm.
constraints: Must be implemented in a high-level programming language
Must include recursive function calls with a maximum depth of 5

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated code adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the correctness and accuracy of recursion depth.
Verifies the time and space complexity of the algorithm.
Checks the clarity, conciseness, and readability of the code.
